versions.version_description: Based on the studio album. Standard chords are used.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

content:
Title: All I Need

Artist/band: Jack Wagner

Source of Chords: Charlie Edsel Valera     
 
        For Comments/Suggestions email us @ charlieedsel_valera

Intro: [ch]A[/ch]-[ch]Am9[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]F#m7[/ch]-[ch]Bm7[/ch]
       [ch]A/C#[/ch]-[ch]Dm7[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]A[/ch]-[ch]E/B[/ch] 2x
 
 
Verse:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m7[/ch]     [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch]-[ch]Dm7[/ch]-[ch]E[/ch]
Kissing you is not what I had planned[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]E/B[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]E7sus[/ch]  [ch]E7[/ch]
And now I’m not so sure just where I stand[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
I wasn’t looking for true love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
But now you’re looking at me[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]E7sus[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
You’re the only one I can think of[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bm7[/ch]  [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]CM9[/ch]/G-[ch]Bm7[/ch]-[ch]E7sus[/ch]-[ch]E7[/ch]
You’re the only one I see[/tab]
 
 
Chorus:
[tab][ch]A[/ch] Ebdim7  [ch]DM[/ch]/F#-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]
All I need[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E7sus[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Is just a little more time[/tab]
[tab]      Ebdim7      [ch]DM[/ch]/F#-[ch]E[/ch]-[ch]D[/ch]
To be sure what I feel[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E7sus[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]
Is it all in my mind[/tab]
[tab]                 Ebdim7       [ch]D/A[/ch]   
Cause it seems so hard to believe[/tab]
 
That you’re all I need
 
 
Verse:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]F#m7[/ch]      [ch]Bm7[/ch]-A/C#DM7-[ch]E[/ch]
Yes it’s true we’ve all been hurt before[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]Bm7[/ch]-A/C#DM7-[ch]E[/ch]
But it doesn’t seem to matter anymore[/tab]
 
 
Refrain:
[tab]  [ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]A/C#[/ch]      [ch]E7sus[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
It may be a chance we’re taking[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
But it always comes to this[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]    [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]E7sus[/ch] [ch]E7[/ch]
If this isn’t love were making[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                     [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]CM9[/ch]/G-[ch]Bm7[/ch]-[ch]E7sus[/ch]
Then I don’t know what it is[/tab]
 
 
(Repeat Chorus except last line)
 
 
Ad lib:
 
 
(Repeat Chorus except last line)
 
[tab][ch]E[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]E7sus[/ch]   [ch]F#m7[/ch]
That you’re all I need[/tab]
 
 
Bridge:
[tab]            [ch]B7[/ch]       [ch]E/G#[/ch]
No stars are out tonight[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m7[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]
But were shining our own light[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]B7sus[/ch]         [ch]G/D[/ch]
And it’s never felt so bright[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7sus[/ch]
Cause girl the way I’m feeling[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]E7[/ch]
It’s easy to believe[/tab]
                        (Do intro)
That you’re al I need
 
 
Coda:
[tab]                        [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, you’re all I need, oooh . . .[/tab]
